name: Prune Conserve I
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the prunes.
2. Cover them with water.
3. Simmer until tender.
4. Cool completely.
5. Remove pits from the prunes.
6. Combine prune pulp, juice, and cored and chopped apples and quinces in a large bowl.
7. Add enough water to cover the fruit mixture.
8. Cook until the fruits are soft.
9. Rub through a sieve to strain the liquid.
10. Add diced watermelon rind and peeled oranges to the fruit pulp.
11. Add sugar, 3/4 of which is the amount of fruit mixture.
12. Stir in raisins.
13. Simmer slowly for several minutes, stirring constantly until thickened.
14. Add chopped nuts and cook an additional 5 minutes.
